headline: Werner, Stock Of The Day, In A Buy Zone As Trucking Recovers
summary: Werner Enterprises is IBD Stock Of The Day as trucking stocks move higher amid a broad industry recovery.  Werner stock eked out a gain in choppy trade on Friday, closing out the week in a buy zone.  Shares of the truckload carrier edged up 0.1% to 46.04 in Friday's stock market action.

raw.headline: Werner, Stock Of The Day, In A Buy Zone As Trucking Recovers

Werner stock eked out a gain in choppy trade on Friday, closing out the week in a buy zone.  Shares of the truckload carrier edged up 0.1% to 46.04 in Friday's stock market action.

headline: Werner, Stock Of The Day, Teases A Breakout As Trucking Recovers
summary: Werner Enterprises is Friday's IBD Stock Of The Day as trucking stocks move higher amid a broad industry recovery.  Shares of the truckload carrier dipped 1% in Friday's stock market action.  Werner stock hit a fresh high on Thursday and remains 3.5% higher for the week.

headline: Is JBHT Stock too Expensive or Still Attractive After Its Rally?
summary: JBHT's earnings growth, estimate revisions and intermodal gains support its rally, but a premium valuation and thin liquidity demand discipline.

headline: Cass: TL linehaul rates advance in June, volume inflection delayed
summary: Freight shipments softened in June but truckload rates continued to step higher year over year, according to a monthly report from Cass Information Systems. The post Cass: TL linehaul rates advance in June, volume inflection delayed appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: J.B. Hunt (JBHT) Stock Fair Value Rises After Analysts Lift Transport Outlook
summary: The latest analyst work on J.B. Hunt Transport Services centers on a higher fair value estimate for the stock, with the modeled figure moving from US$251.45 to US$288.18, a change of about 14.6%. This shift sits alongside a wide range of Street price targets and ratings, reflecting different views on how intermodal growth, the freight cycle, and current valuation line up. Read on to see how these updates fit into the evolving narrative around J.B. Hunt and what you may want to watch...

headline: J.B. Hunt (JBHT) Is Up 5.6% After Record Intermodal Volumes And Profit Rebound In Q2
summary: In the past week, J.B. Hunt Transport Services reported second-quarter 2026 results with revenue rising to US$3,495.30 million and net income to US$181.03 million, lifting diluted EPS from continuing operations to US$1.91 from US$1.31 a year earlier. The company also completed a US$210.06 million share repurchase program and delivered record intermodal volumes with double-digit load growth, while its brokerage business turned profitable for the first time in 14 quarters. We’ll now examine...
